center.name: 马萨葡萄园岛
center.summary: 马萨葡萄园岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括西红脚隼，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a regular wanderer to western Europe, and in August 2004 a red-footed falcon was found in North America for the first time on the island of Martha's Vineyard, Massachusetts

links.evidence: It is a regular wanderer to western Europe, and in August 2004 a red-footed falcon was found in North America for the first time on the island of Martha's Vineyard, Massachusetts
